Registration & Enrollment
Jump to Menu
<#sub_nav_small_bottom>
Johns Hopkins School of Education students are encouraged to register
for courses as early as possible.

Academic & Student Policies
Only students admitted to a graduate degree or certificate program (or
graduate non-degree special status) may register for courses. Please
register early to secure your seat and to avoid a course closing because
maximum capacity is reached or cancellation for low enrollment.
Continuous Enrollment Policy
A *continuous enrollment policy* is in effect starting in the fall 2024
semester. The policy requires that all SOE students matriculated in
degree-seeking programs register each Fall and Spring semester for a
minimum of one credit-bearing course until they have completed their
degree, unless granted a voluntary leave of absence (LOA).
Students who do not register each fall or spring semester registration
deadline must request a voluntary LOA to remain in active status.
Students who fail to enroll or receive an approved LOA will be made
inactive and dropped from the rolls due to enrollment inactivity in the
second week after the start of the semester. Students with an inactive
status will need to reapply for admission. Learn more.
Registration Login
Registration for online and in-person courses can be completed online
using the Student Information System (SIS) portal
, which requires a JHED ID
and a JHU email account.
Please note that students may not sit in on a class without being
officially registered for that class, nor should they contact
instructors to request permission to register for or attend a closed
course. Students who fail to complete their registration and sit in on a
class will not receive a grade or credit for attending class.
/All outstanding debts to Johns Hopkins University must be paid to
register for courses./
Registration Deadlines
Registration opens several months before each semester begins (see
the Academic Calendar
). Students who have been admitted
to a program may register for courses online using the SIS Self-Service
portal which is available 24 hours a day.
Registration Fees*
*
Students will be charged tuition fees and a non-refundable $175
registration fee when initially registering for courses each semester.
Following the initial course registration, students may register for
additional courses
without
being subject to any additional course registration fees. Registrations
are processed as they are received.
Elective Offerings
Please view SIS Self-Service
for a current
list of master’s level courses available as electives and consult with
your adviser if you have questions.
